strengths: 20 years of hands-on engineering experience spanning web, mobile, embedded, and infrastructure — exceeds the 15-year minimum
Entrepreneurial track record: founded and maintains GISCollective, an open-source geo-data platform used in production by NGOs
Recent AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic workflow frameworks, showing genuine builder fluency in the AI tooling space
concerns: No advanced degree and no recognized AI research, publications, or widely-adopted AI platforms — well short of the preferred PhD/Master's in AI
AI expertise is shallow and very recent (under 2 years); the role requires established, recognized authority in AI that can credibly advise strategic customers
Career trajectory and self-presented title remain at Senior/Staff Developer level — no evidence of director-level scope, executive customer advisory, or cross-organizational strategic influence
response.justification: The candidate is a technically capable and intellectually curious generalist with genuine entrepreneurial experience and a real, if nascent, foothold in AI tooling. However, the role is a director-level individual contributor position requiring recognized AI expertise, demonstrated cloud-scale AI product leadership, and the credibility to advise strategic enterprise customers — none of which this resume establishes. The AI work is recent, limited to tooling/framework contributions rather than product strategy, and there is no evidence of the external recognition, executive presence, or strategic advisory experience the position demands.
